tags.name: `mc-step-indicator`
tags.description:
Purpose: A component for displaying a step indicator for a process or workflow.
Category: Forms, Navigation
When to use: When you need to visually represent the progress of a multi-step process.
When not to use: For single-step processes or when a simple progress bar suffices.
Works with components: mc-step-indicator-item
Alternative component names: Step Progress Indicator, Stepper, Progress Tracker

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where you can pass single step items

Attributes:

  * `labels` {`string[]`} - Corresponding labels of different steps in the step indicator control.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the step indicator.

  * `currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item. Index starts from 0.

  * `alignitemsdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable center alignment of first and last item

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable auto-layout and responsiveness on small screen, and preserve original orientation.

Properties:

  * `stepIndicatorItems` {`McStepIndicatorItem[] | undefined`} - 

  * `slottedElements` {`HTMLElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `initializeLabels` - 

  * `updateLabelsProps` - 

  * `labels` {`string[]`} - Corresponding labels of different steps in the step indicator control.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the step indicator.

  * `currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item. Index starts from 0.

  * `alignitemsdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable center alignment of first and last item

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable auto-layout and responsiveness on small screen, and preserve original orientation.

attributes.name: labels
attributes.description:
`labels` {`string[]`} - Corresponding labels of different steps in the step indicator control.

Property: labels

Default:

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the step indicator.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: currentindex
attributes.description:
`currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item. Index starts from 0.

Property: currentindex

Default: 0

attributes.name: alignitemsdisabled
attributes.description:
`alignitemsdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable center alignment of first and last item

Property: alignitemsdisabled

Default: false

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
`orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

Property: orientation

Default: horizontal

attributes.name: autolayoutdisabled
attributes.description:
`autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - Disable auto-layout and responsiveness on small screen, and preserve original orientation.

Property: autolayoutdisabled

Default: false
